contextualHelp.answerEN: Yes! We are a pet-friendly hotel. A nominal fee of ₹500/night applies. We even provide pet beds!
contextualHelp.questionHI: क्या आप पालतू जानवरों को अनुमति देते हैं?
contextualHelp.answerHI: हाँ! हमारा होटल पालतू जानवरों के अनुकूल है। ₹500/रात का मामूली शुल्क लागू होता है। हम पालतू जानवरों के लिए बिस्तर भी प्रदान करते हैं!
contextualHelp.answerES: ¡Sí! Somos un hotel que acepta mascotas. Se aplica una tarifa nominal de ₹500/noche. ¡Incluso proporcionamos camas para mascotas!
contextualHelp.answerAR: نعم! نحن فندق صديق للحيوانات الأليفة. يتم تطبيق رسوم رمزية قدرها 500 روبية/في الليلة. كما نوفر أسرة للحيوانات الأليفة!
contextualHelp.answerFR: Oui ! Nous acceptons les animaux. Des frais nominaux de 500 ₹/nuit s'appliquent. Nous fournissons même des lits pour animaux !
contextualHelp.answerDE: Ja! Wir sind ein tierfreundliches Hotel. Es fällt eine geringe Gebühr von ₹500/Nacht an. Wir stellen sogar Haustierbetten zur Verfügung!
contextualHelp.description: Don't lose a booking to a language barrier. Innhance's Contextual AI recognizes 5+ languages instantly and replies with culturally aware context from FAQs about pet policies to complete room bookings.

digitalConcierge.title: The Digital Concierge.
digitalConcierge.description: Upsell amenities, handle room service, and manage housekeeping requests instantly via WhatsApp. Provide guests an interactive digital menu they can access from their own smartphones.

analyticsPreview.description: Our single, unified dashboard gives you deep insights into guest intent, response efficiency, and direct booking conversion rates. Discover exactly how much revenue you're losing to the "Silence Tax" (nighttime drop-offs).

about.subtitle: ABOUT INNHANCE
about.titleLine1: Built for the hotel that runs on
about.description: India's boutique hotels are built on warmth and personal touch, yet most still lose bookings to midnight WhatsApp messages that go unanswered. Innhance changes that.
about.problemText1: A heritage haveli in Rajasthan shouldn't need a full-time reservations desk. We give boutique properties
about.problemText2: delivered through the app your guests already use.
about.approachText1: We don't replace the host. We free them. Innhance handles the back-and-forth so hoteliers can
about.approachHighlight: focus on the moments that matter
about.approachText2: , the welcome, the story, the experience.
about.founderQuote: "We built Innhance because we watched brilliant hoteliers lose bookings to slow replies, not slow service. The hospitality was always there. The technology just wasn't. Now it is."

testimonials_section.subtitle: See how properties across India are transforming their guest experience.

items.quote: Our front desk used to be overwhelmed with WhatsApp messages asking about room rates. Now the AI handles 90% of them and our direct bookings have shot up. It feels like having an extra staff member working 24/7.
items.author: Nd Manor

items.quote: What amazed me is how naturally it talks to guests. They actually think they are chatting with our manager. We are seeing a lot more confirmed reservations simply because the replies are instant.
items.author: Fateh Villas

items.quote: In Manali network can be tricky and sometimes we miss messages. This tool sits in the cloud and replies instantly. Our OTA commissions have dropped significantly since guests now prefer booking directly on WhatsApp.
items.author: 14 gable

items.quote: We get a lot of foreign tourists and the multi language feature is a game changer. The bot replies in their native language and handles the payment links perfectly.
items.author: Seven Seas

items.quote: Managing group bookings used to take days of back and forth on WhatsApp. Now the bot answers all the common questions about amenities and pricing instantly. We just wake up to the payment notifications.
items.author: Bindram Palace

items.quote: I was skeptical about using AI for our hotel but the setup was so easy. Guests love the instant responses and our reception is much more relaxed now. Highly recommended for boutique properties.
items.author: Meeram Ganga

items.quote: The best part is how it handles late night inquiries. We used to lose so many bookings because guests would message at midnight and book somewhere else by morning. Not anymore.
items.author: Panabi Resorts

items.quote: Since we implemented this our conversion rate from WhatsApp chats has doubled. It smoothly shares pictures and exact availability without us having to check the system manually every time.
items.author: Hotel Gorbandh

items.quote: We host a lot of weekend travelers who ask the same questions about parking and check-in times. The bot takes care of all of that and even sends them the location map automatically.
items.author: Hotel Old Town

items.quote: It is incredibly efficient. We used to pay hefty commissions to travel agents but now the AI drives direct bookings right into our account. The investment paid for itself in the first week.
items.author: Hotel Mani International

faq_section.title: Curious? Let's Clear Things Up.
faq_section.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Innhance's WhatsApp booking engine.

items.question: How quickly does Innhance respond to guests?
items.answer: Innhance responds to guests instantly, usually within seconds. This ensures that no inquiry goes unanswered and helps improve booking conversion rates.

items.question: Can I integrate Innhance with my existing property management system (PMS)?
items.answer: Yes! Innhance integrates seamlessly with most major PMS and booking engines, allowing real-time availability sync and instant booking confirmation.

items.question: Does Innhance support multiple languages?
items.answer: Absolutely. Innhance supports over 7 languages, including Hindi, English, Spanish, Arabic etc. ensuring you can serve guests from anywhere in their preferred language.

items.question: How are payments handled on WhatsApp?
items.answer: We provide secure UPI and Card payment links directly within the WhatsApp chat. Guests can pay quickly and safely, and the payment is routed directly to your hotel's account.

items.question: What happens if the AI cannot answer a question?
items.answer: If Innhance encounters a complex query it cannot handle, it seamlessly transfers the conversation to a human staff member, notifying them so they can take over without the guest noticing.
